title: Create: Mechanized Realm
description: Dive into a tech-driven world where automation transforms survival. Build advanced machinery and streamline resource gathering for endless possibilities!
body: # Welcome to the Mechanized Realm! A Minecraft modpack where technology and automation reign supreme! Dive into a world filled with advanced machinery, innovative systems, and endless possibilities. Players will harness the power of automation to streamline resource gathering, crafting, and building. With mods like Thermal Expansion and Applied Energistics 2, you'll create complex factories and efficient energy networks, transforming your survival experience into a sophisticated technological journey. Explore a diverse landscape populated by advanced mobs and intricate structures. Engage in quests that challenge your engineering skills, discover rare materials, and unlock new tech tiers. Whether you’re a seasoned engineer or new to automation, the Mechanized Realm offers a balanced mix of challenges and rewards that will keep you engaged as you build your ultimate automated empire. Get ready to redefine your Minecraft experience and master the art of technology in the Mechanized Realm! # Modpack Affiliates: ## Mod List: - Applied Energistics 2: Advanced storage and automation mod for item management and crafting. - CoFH Core: Essential library providing core functionality for several tech mods. - Create Goggles: Adds goggles to enhance visibility and interaction with Create mod mechanics. - FerriteCore: Improves performance by optimizing how blocks are loaded and rendered. - Jade: Displays useful item and block information through tooltips. - Mekanism Additions: Expands the Mekanism mod with additional tools and features. - Patchouli: A guidebook mod for providing in-game documentation for other mods. - Tinkers' Construct: Tool and weapon crafting mod that allows for customization and upgrades. - Thermal Expansion: Core tech mod adding machines and energy systems for automation. - Traveler's Backpack: Adds a backpack with extra storage and utility features. - Architectury: Framework for creating compatible mods across different platforms. - Create Enchantment Industry: Enhances the Create mod with advanced enchantment features. - Cris Tales: Adds new blocks and items for creative building. - GeckoLib: A library for creating animated entities and models in Minecraft. - Just Enough Items (JEI): Item and recipe viewing mod to help with crafting. - Mekanism Generators: Adds generators for various power sources in the Mekanism mod. - Slice and Dice: Improves item management (disabled). - Terra Blender: Enhances terrain generation and blending for a more natural look. - Thermal Foundation: Provides foundational components for the Thermal mods. - Waystones: Adds teleportation points for easier navigation around the world. - Create Jetpack: Adds jetpacks for enhanced mobility. - Curios: A mod that allows for additional accessory slots for customization. - Immersive Engineering: Realistic engineering mod that focuses on advanced machinery. - Kotlin for Forge: A library for using Kotlin in Minecraft modding. - Mekanism Tools: Adds tools that integrate with the Mekanism mod. - Spawn Animations: Adds animations for mobs and entities for more dynamic visuals. - Terralith: Enhances world generation with new biomes and terrain features. - Thermal Dynamics: Introduces pipes and item transport systems for automation. - Thermal Innovation: Adds new tech features and machinery to the Thermal mod set. - Xaero's Minimap: A minimap mod for better navigation and exploration. - Xaero's World Map: Provides an extensive world map for exploration. - Biomes O' Plenty: Adds new biomes, plants, and resources to explore. - Create: A versatile mod that allows for creative contraptions and automation. - Entity Culling: Improves performance by optimizing entity rendering. - Naturalist: Introduces wildlife and natural elements to enhance immersion.
